# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found in the reviewed branch state. Reviewed the changed pr-open implementation end-to-end and ignored live .ralph-burning runtime state per scope. Verification: nix build passed; a direct cargo test pr_open --locked attempt could not run because rustup has no default cargo toolchain configured.

## Amendments

None.
